            USER STORY:
            As a cook, I want to have employee data on the system including clock in and out information.

            SEQUENCE DIAGRAM (PlantUML):

actor System

EmployeeDatabase --> System: Return Employee Data
System -> Cook: Display Employee Data

activate Cook

EmployeeDatabase --> System: Confirmation
